svg.text: Building secure, scalable and user-centered web applications.

text.font-family: SF Mono, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
SF Mono, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
text.tspan: I'm an Information Systems undergraduate at UFPB and a Full Stack Developer Intern at PBSoft.
Over the past year, I've been building web applications, implementing new features in
legacy systems, maintaining production software and providing technical support.
I enjoy building secure, scalable and high-performance applications by following clean
architecture, clean code principles and creating intuitive user experiences.
Currently expanding my knowledge across the Full Stack ecosystem and always looking
